title: Eva 03 question
wikitext:
[]: Eva-03 question (Spoilers to be safe.) Post by CyberXIII » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:21 pm When Bardiel activates himself, his core eats the entry plug and Asuka. She's thrust forward towards a blue light that appears to be laughing joyfully. Was that Bardiel's soul? I ask, because when Eva-01 yanks that blue thingy out of Zeruel's core, it looks very similar to whatever that other light was...

[]: Post by wonderluster » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:33 pm lol you said thrust, but being a very simple individual sometimes, Im goin to say that Angel's souls are blue. This may very well have something to do with the fact that Angels are identified as blood type Blue.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 10, 2009 2:38 pm Yea, probably Bardiel's soul.

[]: Re: Eva-03 question (Spoilers to be safe.) Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 10, 2009 2:47 pm CyberXIII wrote: his core eats the entry plug and Asuka

[]: Post by wonderluster » Mon Aug 10, 2009 5:02 pm Ive taken to Reichu's confusion. I think that if you meant to say absorbed but if you happen to be holdin out on some information, please dont!

[]: Post by Evafan » Mon Aug 10, 2009 7:51 pm Using wonderluster's words, being a simple individual with simple suggestions I say blood type blue = blue soul. Just tossing ideas.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 10, 2009 8:47 pm Eva-01 is blood type blue, as well. Huh... Also, in before references to an Eva-R character.

[]: Post by wonderluster » Mon Aug 10, 2009 9:21 pm Reichu wrote: Eva-01 is blood type blue, as well. Huh... Also, in before references to an Eva-R character.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Aug 11, 2009 3:09 pm Zeruel = Adam-derived. Unit 01 = Lilith-derived. Put two and two together.

[]: Post by roblucci01 » Tue Aug 11, 2009 3:40 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Zeruel and Unit 00 = Adam-derived. Unit 01 = Lilith-derived. Put two and two together.

[]: Post by wonderluster » Tue Aug 11, 2009 4:48 pm Ok, then what of our mysterious "Lilin"? the four white ghostly figures? Im sure (arguably) that two of them are Adam and Lilith. That leaves two of them.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 11, 2009 5:25 pm wonderluster wrote: Ok, then what of our mysterious "Lilin"? the four white ghostly figures? Im sure (arguably) that two of them are Adam and Lilith. That leaves two of them.

[]: Re: Eva-03 question (Spoilers to be safe.) Post by CyberXIII » Fri Aug 14, 2009 11:16 am Reichu wrote: CyberXIII wrote: his core eats the entry plug and Asuka

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Aug 18, 2009 8:51 pm Did anyone but me think that Shinji's attack on NERV after the Bardiel fight kinda mimicked or shadowed the mind image during Instrumentality when Child Shinji stomped the pyramid(NERV Base) in after he built it? ;)

[]: Post by carla » Tue Aug 18, 2009 9:26 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Did anyone but me think that Shinji's attack on NERV after the Bardiel fight kinda mimicked or shadowed the mind image during Instrumentality when Child Shinji stomped the pyramid(NERV Base) in after he built it? ;)

[]: Post by wonderluster » Wed Aug 19, 2009 12:40 am So in the Bardiel SLAUGHTER, in the end, Im not sure if it's just me or does it strike anyone else that when unit 01 has the entry plug in its mouth and it's growling slightly, it give the puppy dog kind of feeling? I dunno bout you guys but maybe its the opposite music effect that reminded me of a puppy dog doing something wrong like eating a pillow.

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Aug 19, 2009 8:46 pm Actually I wasn't talking about it being more like a kid throwing a tantrum but just that it seemed to shadow or mimic the scene during instrumentality when he built and stomped the sandcastle, but it always seemed like a kid throwing a tantrum to me though, because thats pretty much what it was.

[]: Post by wonderluster » Wed Aug 19, 2009 9:47 pm Well I think it was clever that they put that part into Rebuild, as much as yes we all see that Shinji has a bumrush of "problems", but he's also just a fourteen year old boy. Iunno, say what you must but Im giving Anno big points on that one.

[]: Post by Teague » Wed Aug 19, 2009 10:04 pm roblucci01 wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: Zeruel and Unit 00 = Adam-derived. Unit 01 = Lilith-derived. Put two and two together.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Aug 19, 2009 10:49 pm We don't know if the thing Kaworu threw was another Lance of Longinus. We know the familiar one is still stuck in Lilith right now, so for all we know, Unit 01 was impaled with something completely different.
